home.heroSubtitle: Start by searching or explore by categories.
home.miniReviewQuote: RateQ helped me find a reliable service provider in Doha. Honest reviews made my decision easy.
home.featuredReviewText: RateQ connects customers with trustworthy businesses across Qatar. The review process is transparent and easy.
home.nearbyMapAlt: Map showing company locations in Doha
home.testimonial1Quote: RateQ made it easy to compare businesses before choosing. I felt confident thanks to real customer feedback.
home.testimonial2Quote: Our company gained credibility through verified reviews. RateQ helps us build trust with new customers in Qatar.
home.testimonial3Quote: I use RateQ whenever I need a service in Doha. The platform is simple, bilingual, and genuinely helpful.
home.whyDescription: We built RateQ to bring transparency to Qatar's business landscape — helping people discover trusted companies through verified, community-driven reviews.
home.whyValue1Desc: Started with vision to make reviewing accessible worldwide
home.whyValue2Desc: Serving millions of students across 180+ countries daily
home.partnersTitle: They Trusted Us to Be #1 Online Review Platform in the World

about.metaDescription: Learn about RateQ — Qatar's trusted review platform connecting customers with verified businesses.
about.subtitle: RateQ empowers people and businesses with honest, verified reviews — helping Qatar make smarter decisions every day.
about.heroCardDesc: RateQ connects customers and businesses through verified feedback — helping everyone make confident choices.
about.storyP1: RateQ was founded to solve a simple problem: finding trustworthy businesses in Qatar shouldn't be guesswork. We saw customers relying on word-of-mouth alone, and good businesses struggling to prove their reputation online.
about.storyP2: Today, RateQ brings transparency to the marketplace — connecting verified reviewers with companies across Doha and beyond, in both English and Arabic.
about.storyQuote: Every review on RateQ helps someone make a better choice.
about.whyDescription: We built RateQ to bring transparency to Qatar's business landscape — helping people discover trusted companies through verified, community-driven reviews.
about.whyValue1Desc: Every review goes through moderation to ensure authenticity and protect the community from spam.
about.whyValue2Desc: Showcase your reputation, respond to feedback, and reach customers actively looking for trusted services.
about.whyValue3Desc: Compare ratings, read real experiences, and choose businesses with confidence across Qatar.
about.teamSubtitle: The people behind Qatar's trusted review platform

footer.aboutText: Modern lifestyles call for protected consumption habits. RateQ offers the most objective company reviews in Qatar.

contact.metaDescription: Get in touch with the RateQ team — we're here to help with reviews, business listings, and support.
contact.subtitle: Have a question about reviews, your business listing, or our platform? We'd love to hear from you.
contact.formSubtitle: Fill out the form and our team will get back to you within 1–2 business days.
contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell us how we can help...
contact.successMessage: Thank you! Your message has been sent.
contact.infoLine: Our support team is here to help you. Please contact us using the form or email us at support@rateq.com.
contact.mapSubtitle: Visit our office in West Bay, Doha
contact.mapAlt: Map showing RateQ office location in Doha
contact.faq1Question: How do I list my business on RateQ?
contact.faq1Answer: Create a business account, complete your profile, and submit it for verification. Our team will review and publish your listing.
contact.faq2Question: How long does review moderation take?
contact.faq2Answer: Most reviews are moderated within 24–48 hours. You'll receive an email once your review is published.
contact.faq3Question: Can I report a fake review?
contact.faq3Answer: Yes. Contact us with the review details and we'll investigate. We take review authenticity seriously.
contact.faq4Question: Do you offer support in Arabic?
contact.faq4Answer: Yes. RateQ is fully bilingual — you can use the platform and contact us in English or Arabic.
